content: OverstoryConfig is the central configuration object with 11 major sections (project, agents, worktrees, taskTracker, mulch, merge, providers, watchdog, models, logging, coordinator, rateLimit, runtime, mission, mail, resilience, compat, headroom, context, reminders, healthPolicy) defined in src/config-types.ts. Loaded from config.yaml + config.local.yaml + CLI flags via src/config.ts with schema validation in src/config-schema.ts.
